attacks.name: Warcry
attacks.description:
You let out a bloodcurdling warcry, interrupting the Enemy and preventing them from using Special Attacks for 2 of its turns.
For the rest of the fight: Gives you +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Max Hit, +${preHitEffect0modValue1}% Crit Chance, and ${preHitEffect0modValue2}% Attack Interval (stacking, max 10 stacks); and gives the Enemy -${preHitEffect1modValue0}% Max Hit, -${preHitEffect1modValue1}% Resistance, and +${preHitEffect1modValue2}% Attack Interval (stacking, max 10 stacks).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: You let out a warcry. On use, <preHitEffect>.

attacks.name: Heartseeker
attacks.description: Avoidable attack for ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage + ${attackDamageMinValue1}%-${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of the Enemy's current HP.

attacks.name: Forceful Sweep
attacks.description: Make a momentous, sweeping slash at the Enemy, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage. On hit, your and your Familiar's next attack deals 2x damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make a momentous, sweeping slash, dealing <damage> damage. On hit, your and your familiar's next attack deals 2x damage.

attacks.name: Slash, Gash, and Maim
attacks.description: Perform ${attackCount} swift attacks that deal your normal damage on hit: ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% on the 1st, ${attackDamageMaxValue1}% on the 2nd, and ${attackDamageMaxValue2}% (+ ${attackDamageMaxValue3} if the Enemy is bleeding) on the 3rd.On hit, each attack has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Bleed that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0} damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s and a ${onHitEffect1modValue0}% Slow for ${onHitEffect1turns} turn(s).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform <count> attacks, dealing <damage> damage. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Counterattack
attacks.description: Focus on defensive manoeuvres. Gives you +${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Melee Maximum Hit for each attack blocked for the duration of this attack (Stacks up to ${preHitEffect0maxStacks} times). Follow up with an unavoidable counterattack that deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> focuses on defensive manoeuvres. On use, <prehitEffect>, followed up by a <avoidable> counterattack that deals <damage>.

combatEffectTemplates.description: Mixin Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that applies modifiers that increase in strength each time the character evades an attack, up to a maximum value.

conditionalModifiers.description:
Adds the Counterattack special attack:
(15%) You focus on defensive manoeuvres, negating all attacks for 5s. For each attack blocked, gain Max Hit, then make an unavoidable attack.
-0.2s Attack Interval, +10% Accuracy Rating, and +10% Lifesteal while using Straight Swords
+5% chance to convert a Miss into a Hit and +5% Dodge chance while using Straight Swords

Adds the Slash, Gash, and Maim special attack:
(10%) Attack 3 times quickly, 60% normal damage on the 1st, 80% on the 2nd, and 100% on the 3rd. Each has 10% chance on hit to inflict 100% Bleed and 20% Slow (2 turns).
+30% Bleed Lifesteal, inflict a 3% Slow on hit, and +20% chance to inflict a 100% Bleed on hit while using Straight Swords
+15% Slash Attack Bonus from Equipment while using Curved Swords
+10% Summoning Max Hit and +5% Max Hit while using Curved Swords

Adds the Forceful Sweep special attack:
(10%) Make a momentous, sweeping slash, dealing 2x your normal damage. On hit, your and your familiar's next attack deals 2x damage.
-10% Summoning Attack Interval, +10% Summoning Max Hit, and +10% Min Hit Based on Max Hit while using Curved Swords
+5% Chance to ignore Enemy Resistance while using Daggers

Adds the Heartseeker special attack:
(10%) Avoidable attack for 80% of your normal damage + 5-10% of the Enemy's current HP.
While using Axes, +0.25% Max Hit per 1% Enemy Resistance
While using Axes, Enemy has -0.1% Max Hit per 1% Enemy Resistance

Adds the Warcry special attack:
(10%) Interrupts the Enemy and prevents them from using special attacks for 2 turns.
For the rest of the fight: Gives you +4% Max Hit, +3% Crit Chance, and -2% Attack Interval (stacking, max 10 stacks); gives the Enemy -4% Max Hit, -3% Resistance, and +2% Attack Interval (stacking, max 10 stacks).
Gain +5% Melee Strength Bonus from Equipment per 10% Enemy Resistance while using Axes
